title: Fix associative array methods not erroring on incompatible types

features.name: first_method with width_incompatible argument
features.description: Code should include calling .first() on an associative array with an argument whose bit width is smaller than the array's key type

features.name: next_method with width_incompatible argument
features.description: Code should include calling .next() on an associative array with an argument whose bit width is smaller than the array's key type

features.name: first_method with same_width compatible type
features.description: Code should include calling .first() on an associative array with an argument of the same width but not the exact typedef type

features.name: next_method with same_width compatible type
features.description: Code should include calling .next() on an associative array with an argument of the same width but not the exact typedef type
